what_it_does: A design/spec markdown defining twelve 'compositions' — named chains built from the cognition engine's primitives that point the engine at the project's own work and at Claude Code's own process. Each composition is specified at chain grain: purpose, how-it-works, the models, the exact MCP tool-calls, and codebase file:line addresses, and each is designed to become a runnable stored graph via save_cascade/run_cascade. The doc frames the engine as an 'exocortex' that offloads broad/shallow/repetitive work to a free local swarm while reserving deep judgment for the premium model.
observations: Twelve numbered compositions (① repo exocortex … ⑫ engine-improves-engine), each with a What-it-does / How-it-works / models / tool-calls / addresses structure.
A dependency-spine ASCII diagram shows the twelve as one circuit, with ① the floor that ②③④⑨⑫ read.
Two invariant safety laws stated: the floor is invariant (surface/mark/draft/propose, never auto-mutate or self-approve) and no-fiction/grounding-is-everything.
A shared-primitives table maps each primitive to its MCP tool signature and engine fn/address (run_items, run_reduce, run_role, capture, find_relations, mark, save_cascade, etc.).
Explicit GPU-honesty: which compositions need the bge-m3 embedder window (①⑤⑨) and which run on the resident 4B swarm today (⑥⑦⑩⑪⑫).
Each composition gives a stored-graph save_cascade form and the run_cascade call with template-input substitution.
Two honest needs-build items flagged in-line (per-step multi-variable prompt substitution; retrieve/similarity having no engine primitive yet).
A BUILD ORDER section sequences the twelve by dependency and GPU-honesty (⑥ first, then ①, then the serve-Tim layer).

Grounding claims with file:line refs (runtime/cognition.py:1085, runtime/suite.py:9633, coherence_actions.py:23, ops/services.json:44-59) and a status line claiming v1 grounded against live MCP schemas + floor 42/42.
standouts: The asymmetry framing — the premium model is the scarce resource, the local swarm is free/concurrent/persistent, and every composition is one trade across that line — is the conceptual core that organizes all twelve.

⑫ engine-improves-engine plus the 'first-use friction is the ⑫ input' section makes the set self-advancing: using the compositions generates the list of how to improve them, fed back through the engine.
The two invariant laws (floor-invariant + no-fiction) are the explicit safety basis for turning the engine on itself, grounded in a 42/42 governance scan.
conventions: Uniform chain-grain spec per composition (the GROUP-V bar), each ending in a stored-graph save_cascade form.
Floor-discipline framing in every composition (surfaces/marks/drafts; build-dispatch via claude -p stays gated).
Grounded with file:line addresses and live MCP tool signatures; honest needs-build items flagged not green-painted.
Registry-is-truth / model-binding-not-hardcoded for per-role model assignment.
concerns: Several pieces are stated as REUSE/wiring (e.g. the ActionRegistry as the saved-cascade machinery) — within this file the cascade RUNNER is described as the GROUP-N runner riding existing primitives, but whether that runner is fully built is not self-evident from this file alone.
The grounded-status line asserts every tool-call block resolved against live schemas this session; that verification claim is not re-checkable from the file itself.
⑨ explicitly leaves an unresolved decision-for-Tim (which of three existing memory systems it complements vs extends) inside an otherwise build-ready spec.
notes: If briefing someone: this is the twelve-composition catalogue turning the cognition engine on the project and on Claude Code's own work — read it as the exocortex playbook, each composition a runnable stored graph with safety floor + grounding laws.
questions: Is the cascade runner that threads step output→input fully built, or is the GROUP-N runner itself part of the work these compositions assume?
Which of the three existing memory systems does ⑨ complement vs extend (the doc leaves this as Tim's decision)?
Are the per-role new roles (digest_for_index, verify_lens, scout, etc.) already authored, or net-new create_role calls these compositions require?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches. The 'What this is' header states it is the next phase — the engine turning on itself, twelve compositions at chain grain becoming stored graphs; the body delivers exactly twelve such specs with tool-calls, addresses, safety laws, and a build order.
apparent_themes: Exocortex / asymmetry — offload broad-shallow to a free swarm, reserve deep judgment
Invariant floor + no-fiction grounding as the safety basis
Self-advancing loop (the engine improves and re-ingests itself)
Stored graphs / saved cascades as authored-once re-runnable units
intention_signals: Trying to operationalize the cognition engine as a practical force-multiplier on a strategic mind — a concrete, safe, grounded set of repeatable chains that push grunt work down and keep judgment up, closing into a self-improving loop.
novelty: The twelve-as-one-circuit dependency spine and the explicit self-feeding mechanism (first-use friction becomes the ⑫ input) are distinctive — a composition catalogue designed to grow itself.
contribution: Contributes the twelve concrete engine compositions (with tool-calls, addresses, models, and stored-graph forms) plus the exocortex/asymmetry framing and the floor+no-fiction safety basis for self-application. A fused system would keep this as the applied playbook for what the cognition engine is FOR.
summary_for_embedding: A spec defining twelve cognition-engine compositions (exocortex, drift-radar, transcript-miner, scout-brief, verification-jury, spec-compiler, etc.) at chain grain with MCP tool-calls, file:line addresses, safety floor laws, and stored-graph save_cascade/run_cascade forms.
intention_for_embedding: To operationalize the cognition engine as a self-advancing exocortex that offloads broad work to a free swarm and reserves deep judgment, via twelve safe grounded repeatable chains.
